items.headline: Unable to cash in vs. Twins, Rox seek better fortune back at Coors

news_items.headline: Aaron Judge flags Yankees' 'lack of focus' ahead of seventh straight loss, still waiting for updated scans on injured rib
news_items.summary: It's not often Judge peels back the clubhouse curtain, but the captain made it clear to reporters on Wednesday that "we just gotta dial it in."

news_items.headline: Red Sox blown out by Nationals, drop final Fenway series before All-Star break
news_items.summary: The Red Sox are fully back down to earth after the thrill of sweeping the Yankees. Boston fell to Washington 10-2 on Wednesday and dropped the series to the Nationals. The Red Sox ran out of momentum after they won the series opener. The starter didn’t have it in the finale and the bats resembled […]

news_items.headline: MLB Draft 2026: Which player will the White Sox take with the No. 1 overall pick?
news_items.summary: The top three options are UCLA shortstop Roch Cholowsky, Georgia Tech catcher Vahn Lackey and a high school shortstop named Grady Emerson.

news_items.headline: Dominic Smith at DH and Mike Yastrzemski in RF in Game 2 vs. the Cardinals
news_items.summary: Otherwise, much is unchanged from Game 1’s lineup.

news_items.headline: Fernando Tatis Jr.'s resurgence critical to Padres' hopes against Dodgers on Sunday Night Baseball
news_items.summary: With the Padres and Dodgers set to conclude a crucial four-game series on Sunday Night Baseball, CC Sabathia turns his eyes towards Fernando Tatis Jr.'s resurgence.

news_items.headline: White Sox can cement "staying power" atop AL Central against Guardians on Star-Spangled Sunday
news_items.summary: CC Sabathia believes the youthful White Sox are the "story of the summer" ahead of their Star-Spangled Sunday bout with the Guardians at 2pm ET on Peacock and NBCSN Extra.
